products.name: White Floral Cotton Cord Set
products.description: A charming ivory cotton cord set adorned with vibrant floral motifs inspired by traditional Indian artistry. Thoughtfully crafted in soft, breathable cotton, the sleeveless kurta paired with comfortable straight pants offers effortless elegance and all-day comfort. Perfect for relaxed days, festive gatherings, and everything in between.
products.careInstructions: Hand wash separately in cold water. Do not bleach. Dry in shade. Iron on medium heat.

products.name: Hand block Printed Long Sleeveless Kurta
products.slug: Hand block Printed Long Sleeveless Kurta
products.description: Thoughtfully crafted in soft, breathable cotton, this hand block printed long sleeveless kurta features delicate floral buta motifs inspired by traditional Indian craftsmanship. The calming indigo hue and easy silhouette come together to create a piece that is both timeless and effortlessly elegant. Designed for all-day comfort, it's perfect for slow mornings, everyday wear, and moments that call for understated grace.
products.careInstructions: Dry clean recommended. Hand wash gently in cold water. Do not wring. Iron on low heat.

products.name: Green Kalamkari Short Kurta
products.description: Rooted in tradition and crafted for everyday elegance, this green Kalamkari short kurta celebrates the beauty of timeless Indian artistry. Adorned with intricate Kalamkari-inspired motifs and tailored in soft, breathable cotton, its relaxed silhouette offers effortless comfort and versatility. Perfect for workdays, casual outings, and moments that call for understated charm.
products.careInstructions: Hand wash separately in cold water. Colors may bleed initially. Dry in shade. Iron on medium heat.

products.name: Green Hakkoba Floral Long Kurta
products.description: Delicately crafted in soft, breathable cotton, this Green Hakkoba Floral Long Kurta is a celebration of timeless elegance and feminine charm. Adorned with intricate floral embroidery inspired by traditional Hakkoba craftsmanship, its graceful silhouette offers effortless comfort and sophistication. Designed for everyday ease and special moments alike, this versatile piece blends heritage artistry with understated beauty.
products.careInstructions: Hand wash separately in cold water. Colors may bleed initially. Dry in shade. Iron on medium heat.

products.name: Floral Peplum Short Top
products.description: Effortlessly feminine and thoughtfully crafted, this Floral Peplum Short Top brings together timeless charm and everyday comfort. Adorned with delicate floral prints and designed with a flattering peplum silhouette, it is tailored in soft, breathable cotton for ease and elegance. Perfect for relaxed days and versatile styling, this piece adds a touch of grace to every occasion.
products.careInstructions: Hand wash separately in cold water. Colors may bleed initially. Dry in shade. Iron on medium heat.

products.name: Kanjivaram Silk Saree Dusty Rose
products.description: A breathtaking Kanjivaram silk saree in romantic dusty rose, handwoven by master weavers of Kanchipuram. Rich zari border with traditional temple motifs in gold.
products.careInstructions: Dry clean only. Store in muslin cloth. Avoid direct sunlight.

products.name: Organza Embroidered Saree Ivory
products.description: Float through celebrations in this ethereal ivory organza saree with delicate floral threadwork and sequin accents. Modern yet timeless elegance.
products.careInstructions: Dry clean only. Handle with care. Store on padded hanger or rolled in tissue paper.

products.name: Cotton Handloom Saree Navy
products.description: A timeless navy cotton handloom saree woven on traditional pit looms. Subtle golden zari stripes and contrasting border add understated luxury.
products.careInstructions: Machine wash gentle cycle or hand wash cold. Mild detergent. Dry in shade. Iron medium heat.
